rationale.fidelity: Exactly preserves one common epsilon, approved interval, mechanism noise, modeled utility-minus-privacy-loss objective, and exclusion of churn and legal penalties.
rationale.managerial_framing: Fully specifies actor, timing, choice, stakes, mechanism, trade-off, counterfactual, and implementation limits.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly positioning is requested or claimed, and novelty is appropriately left unestablished.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Separates modeled relationships from empirical user effects and explicitly rejects retention and compliance conclusions.
rationale.prose_clarity: Precise and well structured, with some boilerplate and encoding noise.
rationale.overall: A complete privacy-utility framing with strong privacy, objective, and evidentiary boundaries.
